summary: Tested LeadsList filter functionality (Territory, State, City). All filters working correctly. Territory filter maps to 'region' field in MongoDB. State and City dropdowns now show all options without requiring parent filter selection (fix verified). Reset functionality works correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new data created - used existing 68 leads
context_for_next_testing_agent: LeadsList filter functionality fully verified. Territory filter uses 'territory' query param but filters on 'region' field in MongoDB (correct behavior per fix). State dropdown shows all states without needing to select territory first. City dropdown shows all cities without needing to select state first. All filter combinations work correctly with proper lead count updates.

territory_filter_has_options.details: Territory dropdown shows: Central India, East India, North India, South India, West India

territory_filter_works.details: Selecting 'South India' reduced leads from 68 to 44, showing only South Indian leads (Chennai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad)

state_filter_shows_all_states_without_te.details: State dropdown shows all 7 states (Delhi NCR, Goa, Karnataka, Maharashtra, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, West Bengal) without selecting territory first - FIX VERIFIED

city_filter_shows_all_cities_without_sta.details: City dropdown shows all cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kochi, Kolkata, Margao, Mumbai, etc.) without selecting state first - FIX VERIFIED

reset_filters_works.details: Clicking Reset returned lead count to 68

territory_filter_uses_region_field.description: Backend correctly maps 'territory' API parameter to 'region' field in MongoDB query

state_dropdown_shows_all_without_territo.description: Uses stateNames when no territory selected, getStateNamesByTerritoryName when territory is selected

city_dropdown_shows_all_without_state.description: Uses cityNames when no state selected, getCityNamesByStateName when state is selected
